name: Pearl River Delta
climate: Subtropical monsoon; hot humid summers with typhoon season (Jun–Nov), mild dry winters; annual rainfall 1600–2000mm

neighbors.name: Greater Bay Area
neighbors.relevance: GBA is the expanded policy framework that encompasses PRD plus Hong Kong and Macau

neighbors.name: South China Sea
neighbors.relevance: PRD ports directly access South China Sea shipping lanes for global exports

neighbors.name: Yangtze River Delta
neighbors.relevance: China's other major manufacturing and export cluster; supply chain interdependence

neighbors.name: ASEAN
neighbors.relevance: Closest international manufacturing competitor; destination for PRD factory relocation

neighbors.name: Taiwan Strait
neighbors.relevance: PRD electronics sector depends on Taiwan semiconductor foundries

links.description: PRD forms the manufacturing core of the broader Greater Bay Area integration zone
Shenzhen and Guangzhou ports route container traffic through the South China Sea
ASEAN nations are top export markets and increasingly competing manufacturing bases
Raw material imports and finished goods exports transit via the Strait of Malacca
PRD electronics and tech manufacturing relies on Taiwan-made chips and components
Inter-cluster trade in components, steel, petrochemicals, and financial services
PRD is a major origin point for BRI maritime shipping and infrastructure equipment exports
